triggers.description: Whenever you attack, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of attacking creatures. If CARDNAME and a creature named Phyrexian Dragon Engine are attacking, and you both own and control them, exile them, then meld them into Mishra, Lost to Phyrexia. It enters tapped and attacking.
Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, ABILITY
